---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new module, concept, or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What concept or feature would you like to see?

A clear description of what you want added or improved.

## Which layer does it belong to?

- [ ] Storage engine (WAL, MemTable, SSTable, B+ Tree, Buffer Pool)
- [ ] Transaction / concurrency (MVCC, locking, isolation levels)
- [ ] Query processing (SQL parser, planner, optimizer)
- [ ] Distribution (sharding, replication, consensus)
- [ ] Operations (auth, pooling, metrics, tracing)
- [ ] Documentation / tutorial content

## Why is it valuable for learners?

Explain what database concept this teaches and which real-world system uses it.

## Are you willing to implement it?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] No, just suggesting
